description: This endpoint creates or updates a batch of Tax Types

id.description: The ID of the Tax Type

name.description: The Name of the Tax Type

origin_data.description: Additional Third-party Metadata for the Tax Type. Note: This is a free-form text field.

origin_id.description: The Third-party ID of the Tax Type

id.description: The ID of the Tax Type. REQUIRED if 'origin_id' is not provided.
